It was a warm afternoon, and the small park near the library was unusually busy. Children ran between the benches, a few dogs chased each other across the grass, and someone was playing soft music from a speaker near the fountain.

By the time the sun started to dip, the crowd had thinned a little. A couple sat on the low stone wall sharing fries, two teenagers practiced skateboard tricks near the sidewalk, and the music by the fountain had been replaced by the sound of water and traffic in the distance.
